patch.value: 2026-06-02 commander SDK custom-field and extension-output hardening

Fresh broad manual audit and optimization pass requested on 2026-06-02 covering latest pm CLI, SDK, package ecosystem, temp-project dogfood, GitHub reports, dependency update PR #93, issue #96 output override diagnostics, and issue #97 custom field setters. Duplicate check: pm context/list-open/list-in-progress plus targeted search found closed broad-audit lineage pm-59gj, pm-kd9n, pm-etxf, pm-z0ip, pm-kddw and open direct follow-ups pm-qvdj, pm-5teq, pm-kcba; this task tracks this later audit pass and links fixes to the existing direct items rather than creating duplicates.

Latest CLI/SDK/ecosystem are audited in isolated temp projects, concrete non-duplicate findings are fixed or documented, GitHub PR/issues/dependency/security reports are handled, release gates and observability checks pass, a PR is reviewed, green, and merged.

value.author: codex-ci-lane-20260602
value.text: Specialist CI/GitHub/dependency/security/observability lane final: GitHub open surface is PR #93 plus issues #96/#97; PR #93 commander 15 has clean merge state and all CI checks passing. Recent latest-main CI/Docs/Dependabot/Nightly runs pass; older Auto Release 26804332718 and Release 26804564260 failed because the release reliability gate lacked required Sentry auth in Actions, while local Sentry gate with telemetry off reports 0 critical/high. Dependabot alerts returned all fixed; secret-scanning returned no alerts; code-scanning API returned no analysis. pnpm audit reports 0 vulnerabilities; pnpm outdated only reports commander 14.0.3 -> 15.0.0. Local health summary ok. No repo file edits by this lane. Follow-ups: merge/close PR #93 after commander 15 compatibility review, configure/verify release Sentry secret or rerun release, add code-scanning setup if desired, and fix current compile error in src/core/extensions/item-fields.ts before rerunning full gates.

value.author: codex-extension-lane-20260602
value.text: Extension override diagnostics lane final findings: GitHub #96 reproduces on current build in isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH after pm init. A single registerService('output_format', () => ({format:'toon'})) makes list-open --json and extension doctor --json output only {format:'toon'}; a single registerRenderer('json', ...) makes both output only the renderer payload. Exact code: registerService/registerRenderer append global overrides in src/core/extensions/loader.ts:1644 and :1661; output_format is exempted from service collision warnings in CHAINED_SERVICE_NAMES at loader.ts:2113; doctor only exposes counts/warnings in src/cli/commands/extension.ts:1488 and deep activation counts at :1582, so one unsafe override has activation_failure_count 0 and no warning. Runtime: src/core/output/output.ts:227 applies service override before renderer, :247 applies renderer; output warnings are not surfaced in normal output. Minimal recommendations: add activation/doctor warnings for globally scoped output_format service and toon/json renderer registrations (include extension layer/name, format/service, and command paths/absence); make extension doctor bypass output_format service/renderers or run with native rendering so diagnostics cannot be corrupted by the thing being diagnosed; document safe contracts in docs/EXTENSIONS.md and docs/SDK.md: output_format must return context.payload/null/undefined unless it owns the command, renderer must return null for unrelated payloads; update RendererOverride type/runtime if null fallback is intended. Tests: add unit coverage in extension-loader/extension-command for unsafe global output warnings and integration repro that doctor --json remains parseable. Verification: pnpm build passed before shared lane edits; focused tests were blocked later by unrelated TS error in src/core/extensions/item-fields.ts known_fields/PmCliErrorContext; pm health --check-only --summary --json passed.

value.author: codex-sdk-lane-20260602
value.text: SDK/custom-item-fields lane final: issue #97 is valid. Current tree now has a partial concurrent implementation (item-fields parser + commander --field contracts) but build is blocked by src/core/extensions/item-fields.ts using unsupported PmCliErrorContext.known_fields; create/update still need --field values wired into runCreate/runUpdate, changed_fields, tool/MCP contracts, docs, and focused tests. Commands: pnpm build passed before concurrent edit; isolated repro showed pm create --field => unknown_option; focused tests now fail at tsc before execution.
